入手方法: イベント: Bonus Pick - Lightning-Type Pokemon Mass Outbreak Event

カードの効果.発動効果: If the [Lightning] Pokémon this card is attached to is in the Active Spot and is Knocked Out by damage from an attack from your opponent’s Pokémon, move 2 [Lightning] Energy from that Pokémon and attach 1 Energy each to 2 of your Benched Pokémon.
